name: ModuLink Inc.
summary: PART I . OVERVIEW ModuLink Inc. (formerly known as International Endeavors Corporation) is a Nevada holding company that through its subsidiaries are engaged primarily in property development construction and design services by implementing modular integrated construction technology (MiC), embedded with our Air-to-Water (A2W) technology and property management system by internet of things technology (IoT).
